doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: The document misstates Illinois law—a 5-day notice gives tenants the right to cure by paying rent and requires a court eviction process before vacating—so it cannot be genuine HUD/AG guidance.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 98
REASON: The document misstates Illinois law—a 5-day notice gives tenants a right to cure by paying rent, and landlords must file and win an eviction suit before tenants are required to vacate—so this cannot be genuine HUD/AG guidance.
response_turn2:
